expo.name: IFTA Track
expo.description: GPS IFTA mileage and fuel-tax tracker for JDLK Expedited Logistics. Automatically records state-by-state distance and fuel purchases on-device for accurate quarterly IFTA reporting.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: JDLK IFTA Track uses your precise location to record mileage by state while you drive.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: JDLK IFTA Track keeps recording mileage by state in the background so your IFTA totals stay accurate while the app is minimized.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: JDLK IFTA Track uses your precise location to record mileage by state while you drive.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: JDLK IFTA Track keeps recording mileage by state in the background so your IFTA totals stay accurate while the app is minimized.
